_comment: MAP-AGNOSTIC TEST: convert FS22 West End (64x, by Levis) -> FS25 as WE25. Different author => different scene-group names (WestEnd/Trees/forest/gameplay, NOT WW's WildWest/roads/Buildings/trees), so the RASTER core (terrain/farmland/texture/foliage) ports via this config but the SCENE-GRAPH tools (flats/buildings/trees/lights) need per-map group-name mapping (see 'scene_groups' TODO).

scene_groups._note: West End (Levis) - different author/names than WW. top = its 4 top groups; trees = Trees+forest. roads/buildings/lights sit inside the mixed WestEnd mega-group under unknown subgroup names -> [] = let classify.py content-detect them.

material_remaps._note: TBD once West End's unshipped-texture materials are enumerated.

tree_palette._note: US palette (same as WW for now; Levis West End is US midwest). Tune per-map if needed.
